pageContext.name: Tanjiro Kamado (Tengen Uzui Is Here!)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai Spirits Ichibansho are proud to announce the newest release, Tanjiro Kamado (Tengen Uzui Is Here!) Collectible Figure!  This figure is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Tanjiro Kamado from the respective anime, Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. Standing at approximately 5.5' tall, Tanjiro Kamado is seen in his popular pose.  Be sure to collect this Tanjiro Kamado Collectible Figure and enhance your Demon Slayer display with other incredible Ichibansho figures!
